name: A Mold of Roquefort
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle gelatin over 1/4 cup of water and let stand.
2. Push Roquefort cheese through a strainer into the mixture with the gelatin and water.
3. Add softened cream cheese and heavy cream to the Roquefort cheese mixture. Mix well.
4. Fold in chopped scallions, pine nuts, and black olives.
5. Sprinkle salt to taste over the mixture.
6. Spray a 3-cup ring mold with cooking spray.
7. Pour the mixture into the prepared mold.
8. Chill until set, stirring gently occasionally.
